message:
feat(net/tcp): graceful TCP shutdown on Drop + ubs:ignore lifecycle annotations

stream.rs:
- Add Drop impl for TcpStream that calls shutdown(Shutdown::Both)
  for graceful TCP teardown instead of relying on close-on-drop
- Wrap inner stream in ManuallyDrop inside into_split() and use
  std::ptr::read to prevent double-shutdown when ownership transfers
  to OwnedReadHalf/OwnedWriteHalf

split.rs, socket.rs, resolver.rs:
- Add ubs:ignore annotations documenting shutdown lifecycle ownership
  at each transfer point (caller owns shutdown, short-lived streams
  close-on-drop acceptable, etc.)

These changes ensure the UBS (Ultimate Bug Scanner) can verify that
every TcpStream has a clear shutdown owner without false positives
on intentional design decisions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
